name: Student of Viscera

abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Living Savant
abilities.text: This model receives a (-) when it targets a living model.

abilities.name: Pursue
abilities.text: This model receives +1 Skl when targeting a model that has already activated this turn.

actions.name: Necropsy
actions.effects: If this action kills the target, draw a card and discard a card.

triggers.name: Caught Alone
triggers.text: This trigger can only be declared if there are no different enemy models within 6" of the target. When resolving, this action deals +1 damage and ignores (warding), (fortitude), and (warding) abilities.

triggers.name: Onslaught
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting the same model.

actions.name: Emergency Surgery
actions.effects: Remove up to one token from the target and the target heals 2. The target heals an additional 2 for each raise this action receives.

triggers.name: Study Opponent
triggers.text: This model gains either a Focused or Shielded token.

actions.name: Ambush
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this model is not in concealing terrain, it must discard a card.
actions.effects: This model moves up to its Sp, unaffected by severe terrain.

extraction_notes: Caught Alone trigger text mentions three symbols: (warding), (fortitude), and (warding). The OCR appears to show the same icon three times, but I preserved as written. The middle icon may be intended to be a different ability icon.
